hero.tagline: Hyper-personalized luxury travel, crafted for the few.

about.label: Our Story
about.heading: Two People. One Obsession.
about.subheading: We started Nomad Privé because the trips we wanted didn't exist.
about.body1: My partner studied Tourism & Hospitality at university. I spent years traveling with one rule: go where the tourists don't.
about.body2: Between us, we've built something neither of us could have alone — the academic foundation of hospitality and destination management, combined with the instinct of someone who has eaten street food at 2am in a Marrakesh medina and found the best surf break in Lombok before it had a name.
about.body3: We've been to 22+ countries across four continents. We know the difference between a hotel that looks beautiful on Instagram and one that actually changes how you feel. We have contacts — real ones, built over years — at boutique hotels, private villas, charter operators, and restaurants that don't take walk-ins.
about.body4: When something goes wrong on a trip (and something always does), we solve it before our clients notice it was a problem.

packages.label: Packages
packages.heading: The Experience Made for You
packages.tagline3: By referral only. For those who want the impossible.

footer.referral: We accept new clients exclusively through personal referrals.
footer.cta: Your next journey begins with a conversation.
footer.description: Hyper-personalized luxury travel for those who refuse the ordinary. Built on firsthand experience, run on real relationships.

quiz.result: Based on your answers, this is your perfect journey.
